title: FourJaw
subtitle: Established a clearer UX direction for an industrial SaaS product operating under delivery and stakeholder constraints.
bullets: Shifted work from reactive UI changes to a structured UX decision model
Aligned product, engineering, and commercial input around shared priorities
Introduced clearer journey and information structures to reduce user friction
result: Stronger product clarity, faster decision-making, and improved confidence across teams.

title: Databowl
subtitle: Improved onboarding and learning flow structure for a lead-generation and LMS-linked training environment.
bullets: Mapped fragmented acquisition-to-learning journeys into a coherent flow
Reframed content and interactions around user intent and progression
Reduced ambiguity between quote funnels, training touchpoints, and next steps
result: A more coherent multi-touchpoint experience that was easier to navigate and manage.

Case study visual placeholder representing Databowl LMS integration

title: QuoteHound Ecosystem
subtitle: Designed a multi-site quote ecosystem linked into Databowl workflows, balancing conversion speed with trust.
bullets: Built a consistent UX pattern across multiple quote-focused properties
Structured high-friction form journeys to maintain momentum and confidence
Aligned acquisition experiences with downstream learning and operational workflows
result: A unified ecosystem that supported both lead quality and operational continuity.
